subcodes.first_line: O thou musk-scented pilgrim! Thy letter was received and its contents were understood. It is evident that the friends are deserving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس نامه شما رسید و مضمون مفهوم گردید معلوم است سزاوار یاران
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @petitions to authorities, @growth of the Cause, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
